word: G660 - ἀποτινάσσω - apotinássō - ap-ot-in-as'-so - Shake off

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποτινάσσω

- Transliteration: Apotinasso

- Phonetic: ap-ot-in-as'-so

- Definition:

1. to shake off

- Origin: from G575 and tinasso (to jostle)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and τινάσσω tinassō (to jostle); to brush off: - shake off.
